# Read the file
path = "/mnt/data/file-ALRe31Xro21LF7DYn9CSaH-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "rb") as f:
    raw_bytes = f.read()
raw = raw_bytes.decode("utf-8")
print(raw)

import re, json, textwrap, sys, unicodedata
raw = open("/mnt/data/file-ALRe31Xro21LF7DYn9CSaH-text_to_analyse.txt","r",encoding="utf-8").read()

spans=[]

# Ayas between markers
for m in re.finditer(r"\(aya_start\)(.*?)\(aya_end\)", raw, flags=re.DOTALL):
    span_text = m.group(1)
    # Trim per rules edge punctuation/quotes/space
    trim = " \n\r\t\"'«»()[]{}<>،؛:.,!؟…ـ"
    while span_text and span_text[0] in trim:
        span_text=span_text[1:]
        m = re.search(re.escape(span_text), raw)
    while span_text and span_text[-1] in trim:
        span_text=span_text[:-1]
    start = raw.find(span_text, m.start() if isinstance(m, re.Match) else 0)
    end = start + len(span_text)
    assert raw[start:end]==span_text
    spans.append((start,end,span_text,"Aya"))

# Hadith "إنما بعثت معلما" occurrences near "قال النبي" or hadith cue
hadith_text = "إنما بعثت معلما"
for m in re.finditer(re.escape(hadith_text), raw):
    # check nearby cues within ±64
    left = raw[max(0,m.start()-64):m.start()]
    right = raw[m.end():m.end()+64]
    cues = ["قال النبي","النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم","قال رسول الله","في الحديث","روي"]
    if any(c in left or c in right for c in cues):
        spans.append((m.start(), m.end(), hadith_text,"Hadeeth"))

# References section ayahs

# 1) بعد: استمالة القلوب، كقوله تعالى:
ref1_prefix = "استمالة القلوب، كقوله تعالى:"
i = raw.find(ref1_prefix)
print(i)
print(raw[i:i+300])

# Manually isolate the ayah text until "غافر"
start1 = raw.find("وَقالَ الَّذِي آمَنَ", i)
end1 = raw.find("غافر", start1)
span1 = raw[start1:end1].strip()
print(span1)

# 2) طول الفصل، كقوله تعالى
j = raw.find("طول الفصل، كقوله تعالى", i)
print(j, raw[j:j+200])
start2 = raw.find("يا أَبَتِ", j)
end2 = raw.find("يوسف", start2)
span2 = raw[start2:end2].strip()
print(span2)

# 3) التنزيه، كقوله تعالى
k = raw.find("التنزيه، كقوله تعالى", i)
print(k, raw[k:k+200])
start3 = raw.find("وَيَجْعَلُونَ لِلَّهِ", k)
end3 = raw.find("النحل", start3)
span3 = raw[start3:end3].strip()
print(span3)

# 4) التعظيم، كما في قوله تعالى
l = raw.find("التعظيم، كما في قوله تعالى", i)
print(l, raw[l:l+200])
start4 = raw.find("فَلا أُقْسِمُ بِمَواقِعِ النُّجُومِ", l)
end4 = raw.find("الواقعة", start4)
span4 = raw[start4:end4].strip()
print(span4)

# Collect spans with indices computed accurately
def add_span(span_text, ctype):
    # trim edges from the raw text
    trim = " \n\r\t\"'«»()[]{}<>،؛:.,!؟…ـ"
    # find exact occurrence
    idx = raw.find(span_text)
    start = idx
    end = idx+len(span_text)
    # ensure equality
    assert raw[start:end]==span_text
    spans.append((start,end,span_text,ctype))

add_span(span1,"Aya")
add_span(span2,"Aya")
add_span(span3,"Aya")
add_span(span4,"Aya")

# Prepare output JSON
output=[]
for s,e,t,ctype in sorted(spans):
    output.append({"span_start":s,"span_end":e,"span_text":t,"citation_type":"Aya" if ctype=="Aya" else "Hadeeth"})
len(output), output[:3]

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":278,"span_end":396,"span_text":"وَقُلْ إِنِّي نَذِرٌ لِّرَبِّي وَلَا أَقُولُ لِلَّذِينَ تَجْهَرُ بِالْعَمَلِ السَّيِّئَاتِ مَا تَفْعَلُونَ مِنْ شَيْءٍ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":458,"span_end":473,"span_text":"إنما بعثت معلما","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":627,"span_end":791,"span_text":"وَلَقَدْ نَعْلَمُ أَنَّكَ يَضِيقُ صَدْرُكَ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ * فَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ وَكُن مِّنَ السَّاجِدِينَ * وَاعْبُدْ رَبَّكَ حَتَّىٰ يَأْتِيَكَ الْيَقِينُ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":852,"span_end":867,"span_text":"إنما بعثت معلما","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1017,"span_end":1070,"span_text":"وَذَكِّرْ فَإِنَّ الذِّكْرَىٰ تَنْفَعُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":1131,"span_end":1146,"span_text":"إنما بعثت معلما","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1298,"span_end":1450,"span_text":"وَلَا تَسْتَوِي الْحَسَنَةُ وَلَا السَّيِّئَةُ ۚ ادْفَعْ بِالَّتِي هِيَ أَحْسَنُ فَإِذَا الَّذِي بَيْنَكَ وَبَيْنَهُ عَدَاوَةٌ كَأَنَّهُ وَلِيٌّ حَمِيمٌ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":1507,"span_end":1522,"span_text":"إنما بعثت معلما","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1763,"span_end":1925,"span_text":"وَقالَ الَّذِي آمَنَ يا قَوْمِ اتَّبِعُونِ أَهْدِكُمْ سَبِيلَ الرَّشادِ* يا قَوْمِ إِنَّما هذِهِ الْحَياةُ الدُّنْيا مَتاعٌ وَإِنَّ الْآخِرَةَ هِيَ دارُ الْقَرارِ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":1998,"span_end":2098,"span_text":"يا أَبَتِ إِنِّي رَأَيْتُ أَحَدَ عَشَرَ كَوْكَباً وَالشَّمْسَ وَالْقَمَرَ رَأَيْتُهُمْ لِي ساجِدِينَ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":2314,"span_end":2380,"span_text":"وَيَجْعَلُونَ لِلَّهِ الْبَناتِ سُبْحانَهُ وَلَهُمْ ما يَشْتَهُونَ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":2420,"span_end":2500,"span_text":"فَلا أُقْسِمُ بِمَواقِعِ النُّجُومِ* وَإِنَّهُ لَقَسَمٌ لَوْ تَعْلَمُونَ عَظِيمٌ","citation_type":"Aya"}]}
